scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@job-bot/agent-core --prefix ../.. && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');for(const f of ['linkedinScrapeInpage.js','linkedinSearchUi.js','linkedinScrapeClickTargets.js'])fs.copyFileSync('src/sources/'+f,'dist/sources/'+f)"
scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --test src/sources/linkedinScrapeInpage.test.js src/sources/linkedinScrapeBundle.test.js src/sources/linkedinSearchCriteria.test.js src/sources/linkedinSearchUi.test.js src/sources/remotiveJobs.test.js src/ranking/cursorCli.test.js src/ranking/cursorBatchFiles.test.js src/ranking/rankRunLogHub.test.js ../../packages/shared/src/sources/remotiveCategories.test.js ../../packages/shared/src/ranking/rankingCursorBatch.test.js ../../packages/shared/src/ranking/validateIndividualScores.test.js
